query:
now here's the evaluation run of 415: ---
  Eval run complete — Issue #415 Phase 1 measurement

  Results (4,349 scenarios, 2026-03-29 snapshot):

  ┌────────┬────────┬───────────────┬─────────────┐
  │ Metric │ Value  │  Gate target  │   Result    │
  ├────────┼────────┼───────────────┼─────────────┤
  │ CC@5   │ 0.4244 │ ≥ 0.3659      │ PASSED      │
  ├────────┼────────┼───────────────┼─────────────┤
  │ ICD    │ 0.6381 │ ≥ 0.5341      │ PASSED      │
  ├────────┼────────┼───────────────┼─────────────┤
  │ MRR    │ 0.004  │ ≥ 0.35        │ nominal     │
  │        │        │ (floor)       │ FAIL        │
  └────────┴────────┴───────────────┴─────────────┘

  Why MRR failed the floor: The active corpus grew
  from ~370 to 997 entries since the col-030 soft
  ground truth was recorded. 21% of ground truth
  entries are now quarantined (can't appear in
  results). MRR measuring 0.004 vs 0.40 historical is
  a measurement artifact, not a quality regression.

  Key finding on PPR vs no-PPR: All three profiles
  (pre-PPR, PPR+direct, PPR-only) produced identical
  CC@k and ICD. The graph currently has only ~22
  Supports edges — PPR's multi-hop effect isn't yet
  measurable. The direct co-access boost (w_coac=0.10)
   is similarly invisible.

  Phase 1 gate verdict: Diversity targets passed.
  Phase 2 (reducing w_coac) can proceed. The lack of
  measurable difference between PPR-only and
  PPR+direct strengthens the case: the direct boost
  isn't adding value at current data density, so
  reducing w_coac is low-risk.

entries.title: ADR-007: NLI-Derived Auto-Quarantine Uses a Higher Confidence Threshold
ADR-003 nan-008: Round-Trip Integration Test Guards Dual Type Copy and Section Order
ADR-005 crt-030: PPR Pipeline Position — Step 6d Between 6b and 6c
ADR: Conservative Ground Truth Backfill Scope (crt-008 ADR-006)
Default freshness half-life (168h) miscalibrated for durable knowledge bases — silently kills ADR and convention confidence
